headline: GDP COMPLIANCE IN TRANSIT
subheading: Hold couriers and 3PLs to account on temperature, security and traceability
flux_prompt: A vivid text-free editorial illustration evoking pharmaceutical cold-chain distribution and unbroken transit integrity: an abstract insulated shipping container glowing from within, suspended along a luminous flowing route line that threads across a stylised map-like grid, with a softly rendered refrigerated delivery vehicle and loading-bay silhouette receding into atmospheric depth. Subtle frost crystals and a faint temperature-gauge arc of light suggest precise monitoring and an intact cold chain. Floating geometric nodes and a delicate chain-link motif imply chain-of-custody, security seals and end-to-end traceability. Deep navy background washed with teal and cyan gradients, lifted by a subtle green accent glow from a monitoring readout, brushed-steel reflective surfaces, shallow depth of field, soft volumetric rays, clinical-luxury precision and premium calm. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
